  "description": "First Excelsia Professional Services - Our client, an international commercial Bank, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Banking Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Nationwide&nbsp;(Across all 36 States of Nigeria and the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Abuja)
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Banking &amp; Finance

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking results-driven sales professionals within the financial sector to join its dynamic team.
	The role involves driving sales of financial products and services, meeting set targets, and contributing to overall business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of the bank&rsquo;s financial products, including accounts, loans, and digital services.
	Identify and onboard new customers through proactive marketing and networking.
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships to support retention and growth.
	Achieve assigned sales targets and performance objectives.
	Cross-sell and upsell products based on customer needs.
	Ensure proper documentation and compliance during customer onboarding.
	Provide regular reports on sales activities and performance.
	Represent the bank professionally in all customer interactions.


Person Specifications


	Minimum of an OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in a relevant field.
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in banking or financial sales.
	Strong knowledge of banking products and services.&nbsp;
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Proven ability to meet or exceed sales targets.
	High level of professionalism and integrity.
	Ability to work independently and in different locations across Nigeria.


Remuneration
N120,000 net monthly plus commissions, performance-based incentives, and additional benefits.",

Banking Sales Executive Job at First Excelsia Professional Services




        
    

        
        First Excelsia Professional Services - Our client, an international commercial Bank, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Banking Sales Executive

Job Location: Nationwide (Across all 36 States of Nigeria and the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Abuja)
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Banking & Finance

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is seeking results-driven sales professionals within the financial sector to join its dynamic team.
	The role involves driving sales of financial products and services, meeting set targets, and contributing to overall business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of the bank’s financial products, including accounts, loans, and digital services.
	Identify and onboard new customers through proactive marketing and networking.
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships to support retention and growth.
	Achieve assigned sales targets and performance objectives.
	Cross-sell and upsell products based on customer needs.
	Ensure proper documentation and compliance during customer onboarding.
	Provide regular reports on sales activities and performance.
	Represent the bank professionally in all customer interactions.


Person Specifications


	Minimum of an OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field.
	1–3 years of experience in banking or financial sales.
	Strong knowledge of banking products and services. 
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Proven ability to meet or exceed sales targets.
	High level of professionalism and integrity.
	Ability to work independently and in different locations across Nigeria.


Remuneration
N120,000 net monthly plus commissions, performance-based incentives, and additional benefits.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Utiva Nigeria is a&nbsp;technology education and talent accelerator that helps individuals in emerging markets learn premium tech skills and connects them with global hiring opportunities. It offers live, instructor-led virtual bootcamps in data analytics, product management, design, and software development, serving over 200,000 professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Growth Associate

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojodu Berger,&nbsp;Lagos
Work Mode:&nbsp;Hybrid

Summary


	We are seeking experienced and proactive Senior Growth Associates to drive sales, build customer relationships, and support revenue growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate leads, prospect clients, and close sales
	Engage prospective students, promote the organisation programs, and convert leads
	Collaborate with Marketing and Training teams on sales strategies
	Maintain records of student payments and performance dashboards
	Represent the company in meetings and business discussions
	Carry out other assigned duties.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of sales experience
	Proven track record of meeting targets
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Mature, responsible, and self-driven
	Ability to work independently and in a team.


Salary
N150,000 Net, plus 5% commission on closed deals

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;wuraola@utiva.co&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Senior Growth Associate Job at Utiva Nigeria




        
    

        
        Utiva Nigeria is a technology education and talent accelerator that helps individuals in emerging markets learn premium tech skills and connects them with global hiring opportunities. It offers live, instructor-led virtual bootcamps in data analytics, product management, design, and software development, serving over 200,000 professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Growth Associate

Job Location: Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Work Mode: Hybrid

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking experienced and proactive Senior Growth Associates to drive sales, build customer relationships, and support revenue growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate leads, prospect clients, and close sales
	Engage prospective students, promote the organisation programs, and convert leads
	Collaborate with Marketing and Training teams on sales strategies
	Maintain records of student payments and performance dashboards
	Represent the company in meetings and business discussions
	Carry out other assigned duties.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of sales experience
	Proven track record of meeting targets
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Mature, responsible, and self-driven
	Ability to work independently and in a team.


Salary
N150,000 Net, plus 5% commission on closed deals

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Raphael Group
content:
A professional virtual assistant service that connects employers with skilled remote assistants. We offer a wide range of services to support individuals and businesses, including scheduling, email management, research, and more. We take the hassle out of finding and hiring qualified virtual assistants, allowing you to focus on growing your business.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Operations Manager

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time
Working Hours: 4:00 PM – 1:00 AM WAT (aligned with US business hours)

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a highly competent, proactive, and results-driven Operations Manager to lead and oversee daily production operations from planning to final delivery.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring production targets are met efficiently, cost-effectively, and on schedule while maintaining high standards of quality, performance, and accountability.
	A strong leader with excellent operational judgment, problem-solving ability, and hands-on experience managing people, processes, timelines, and output in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee end-to-end production activities to ensure smooth daily operations.
	Develop, manage, and execute production schedules based on business priorities and deadlines.
	Ensure production targets, turnaround times, and service levels are consistently achieved.
	Monitor workflow, identify bottlenecks, and implement immediate corrective actions.
	Maintain continuity of operations with minimal downtime or disruption.
	Lead, supervise, and coordinate production staff to ensure productivity and accountability.
	Assign tasks, set clear expectations, and monitor daily performance.
	Conduct regular check-ins, coaching, and performance reviews.
	Build a high-performance culture focused on discipline, ownership, and continuous improvement.
	Support hiring, onboarding, and training of new production team members when required.
	Ensure all output meets approved quality standards, specifications, and client expectations.
	Implement and maintain quality control procedures across all stages of production.
	Address quality issues promptly and drive preventive solutions.
	Ensure compliance with internal policies, operational procedures, and safety standards.
	Analyze workflows, productivity trends, and production data to improve efficiency.
	Introduce systems, tools, and best practices that enhance output and reduce waste.
	Optimize resource allocation including manpower, tools, and materials.
	Drive continuous improvement initiatives across the production function.
	Prepare accurate daily, weekly, and monthly production reports.
	Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless execution.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Management, Engineering, Business Administration, Industrial Management, or related field is an advantage.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience as a Production Manager, Operations Manager, or similar leadership role.
	Relevant practical experience may be considered in place of formal education.
	Proven experience managing teams, workflows, deadlines, and performance targets.
	Strong track record of improving operational efficiency and delivering measurable results.


Must Have


	Strong leadership and people management skills.
	Excellent planning, organization, and execution ability.
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	High attention to detail and quality control mindset.
	Strong analytical and reporting skills.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficiency with spreadsheets, reporting tools, and production management systems.
	Self-management, discipline, and accountability in a remote work environment.
	Experience working with US-based teams or managing remote teams (added advantage)


Work Requirements:


	Reliable and functional laptop or PC
	Stable internet connection and consistent power supply.
	Quiet, professional workspace suitable for remote work.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 13th May, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

2.) Project Coordinator

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are hiring a Project Coordinator who will beresponsible for identifying, engaging, and onboarding small businesses within Lagos Mainland to participate in a community-focused initiative that supports small businesses/solopreneurs by providing access to manpower and recruitment support at no cost for a limited period.


Key Responsibilities
Sourcing & Outreach:


	Identify small businesses and solopreneurs within target mainland locations.
	Conduct physical visits and outreach to introduce the Project.
	Explain the initiative clearly, including benefits and expectations.
	Assess suitability based on eligibility criteria.


Interview Coordination:


	Schedule and coordinate recorded interviews.
	Serve as the communication bridge between the internal team and participating businesses.
	Ensure timely availability and preparedness of business owners.


Ideal Candidate Profile
We are looking for someone who:


	Is confident speaking to business owners and decision-makers.
	Has strong persuasion and negotiation skills.
	Is highly organized and self-driven.
	Can work independently with minimal supervision.
	Understands small business challenges and growth constraints.
	Is comfortable working in a field-based role.


Requirements


	A Bachelor’s Degree or the academic equivalent is a huge advantage with 1–2 years of experience in business development, sales, communitye ngagement, project coordination, or similar roles.
	Strong verbal communication skills.
	Professional appearance and conduct.
	Ability to meet performance targets.
	Must be based on Lagos Mainland.
	NB: This is not one of those coordination roles where everything needs to be spelt out for you, it is an opportunity to be at the forefront of a high-impact initiative, hence the ideal candidate must be smart, and possess the ability to take initiative and perform at a high operational standard.


Salary
N150,000 / Month.

Application Closing Date: 31st April, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

3.) Beauty Professional

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: 6 Days a Week (1 Day Off)
Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM

About the Role


	We are looking to hire skilled and passionate Beauty Professionals to join our team at our Lekki location. We are seeking individuals with hands-on experience in beauty and wellness services who are committed to delivering excellent service and creating a great client experience.
	This opportunity is ideal for professionals with experience in spa therapy, nail services, or professional hair braiding who are looking to work in a structured and professional beauty environment.


Key Responsibilities
Provide professional beauty and wellness services based on your area of expertise:


	Spa & Massage Services: 
	
		Perform massage techniques such as Swedish massage, Deep Tissue massage, Relaxation massage, and Hot Stone, where applicable.
		Provide body treatments including body scrubs, skin toning treatments, and other therapeutic spa services.
	
	
	Nail Care Services: 
	
		Provide manicure and pedicure services, including gel polish application, acrylic nails, nail extensions, and nail art where applicable.
	
	
	Hair Braiding Services: 
	
		Create a variety of braid styles, including Knotless braids, Box braids, and Stitch braids.
		Wig installation is considered an added advantage.
	
	


General Responsibilities:


	Assess client needs and recommend suitable treatments or services.
	Maintain a clean, safe, and hygienic workstation while ensuring all tools and equipment meet professional sanitation standards.
	Deliver a calm, professional, and customer-focused experience for every client.


Candidate Profile


	Candidates must have at least 1 year of practical experience in a beauty salon, spa, or wellness environment.
	Relevant certification or professional training in beauty therapy, nail technology, massage therapy, or hair braiding will be an added advantage.
	Applicants must also demonstrate a strong understanding of hygiene, sanitation, and professional service standards.
	We are looking for individuals with a professional attitude and appearance, strong customer service skills, and attention to detail.
	Candidates must be punctual, reliable, and able to work well within a team while maintaining high service standards in a fast-paced beauty environment.


Application Closing Date: 30th April, 2026.
